metadata.title: Online Text to Speech Generator
metadata.description: Turn text into natural speech, preview audio online, and download MP3 files after sign-in.

shell.footerDescription: Turn text into speech, preview online, and download MP3 files after sign-in.

hero.title: Online Text to Speech Generator
hero.description: Paste text, choose a language and voice, preview natural speech online, then sign in when you need an MP3 download.

generator.sampleText: Paste notes, short articles, or study material here to preview them as speech.
generator.previewError: Preview generation failed. Try a shorter text.
generator.audioEmpty: Preview audio appears here after generation.
generator.previewHint: Preview is free. Sign in to download MP3.

samplePresets.label: Study notes
samplePresets.text: Photosynthesis helps plants convert sunlight into energy. The process uses carbon dioxide, water, and chlorophyll to produce glucose and oxygen.

samplePresets.label: Article intro
samplePresets.text: Daily reading habits can improve focus, vocabulary, and long-term learning. Listening to text is a practical way to review ideas while commuting or exercising.

samplePresets.label: Product script
samplePresets.text: Create a quick voice preview for your product walkthrough. Paste the script, choose a voice, generate speech, and sign in when you need an MP3 download.

workflow.title: Built around the direct text to speech path.
workflow.description: V1 stays focused on the core job: paste text, generate speech, listen online, and download MP3 after sign-in.

privacy.title: Text history stays limited
privacy.description: Generation history stores a short text preview, character count, language, voice, model, and audio metadata. Full original text is not retained.

limits.title: Clear quotas, no unlimited claims
limits.description: Free, lifetime, and extra-credit plans use explicit character limits so generation cost stays controlled.
